# Tealium Consent

Capture, interpret, and enforce user consent across client-side and server-side environments.

## About markdown versions

All pages in this area are available in clean markdown format. To access the markdown version of any page, append `/index.md` to the page URL.

Example:
- HTML: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/`
- Markdown: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/index.md`


## Tealium Consent


- [About consent orchestration](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/server-side/consent-orchestration/about/): This article provides an overview of consent orchestration.

- [Tealium consent overview](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/consent-overview/): Learn how Tealium enforces user consent across client-side and server-side platforms, and choose the right solution for your setup, whether using a commercial consent management platform, custom tool, or Tealium-supported consent capture.

- [Handling conflicts in enforcement conditions](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/server-side/consent-orchestration/enforcement-conditions-conflict/): This article describes how consent orchestration handles conflicts in the conditional enforcement of purpose groups and exemptions, while adhering to privacy by design and privacy by default principles.

- [CookieConsent consent integration](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/cookieconsent-consent-integration/): This guide provides detailed steps for integrating the CookieConsent open-source consent management tool with Tealium iQ.

- [About consent management](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/about/): This an overview of the features and resources of client-side consent management. These tools are designed to assist you in achieving compliance with any regional consent regulations that apply to your business.

- [About the Explicit Consent Prompt Manager](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/explicit-consent-prompt/about/): The Explicit Consent Prompt Manager makes it easy to deploy a prompt to your website to allow users to opt-in or opt-out of tracking.

- [About the Opt-out Privacy Banner and Popup](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/privacy-banner-and-popup/about/): The opt-out consent manager makes it easy to allow users to opt-out of the sale of personal information and set preferences for the sale of personal information.

- [How the consent preferences manager works](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/consent-preferences-dialog/about/): The Consent Preferences Manager makes it easy to deploy a tracking preferences option to your website. Customers are able to specify which categories of tags they want to allow. This tools offers full access to customize the code that generates the preferences pop-up and the ability to translate content for your global customers.

- [Tealium consent register](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-register/): This article provides an overview of Tealium consent register.

- [Google consent mode](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/google-consent-mode/): This article provides an overview of Google consent mode and how to use the translation extension for consent mode mappings.

- [Manual server-side consent enforcement](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/server-side/manual-enforcement/): Learn how to manually enforce consent for visitor-level server-side scenarios, and for event-level scenarios when automatic enforcement is disabled and consent orchestration is not in use.

- [Server-side consent management](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/server-side/consent-management/): The consent preferences manager helps you deploy a tracking preferences option to your website. The consent decision provided by the consent manager is automatically enforced by select server-side products.

- [Manage consent preferences](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/consent-preferences-dialog/manage/): This article explains how to manage settings in the Consent Preferences Manager.

- [Manage explicit consent prompt](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/explicit-consent-prompt/manage/): This article explains how to manage settings in the Explicit Consent Prompt.

- [Manage opt-out privacy banner & popup](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/privacy-banner-and-popup/manage/): This article explains how to manage settings in the opt-out Model privacy banner and popup.

- [Consent change event specifications](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/server-side/event-specs/): Consent events identify a visitors interactions with the Tealium consent manager.

- [Global consent parameters](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/global-parameters/): The Consent Prompt Manager and the Consent Preferences Manager use parameters to represent translatable text that displays in the prompts.

- [About Global Privacy Control (GPC)](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/global-privacy-control/about/): This article describes the Global Privacy Control (GPC), a proposed browser standard that allows users to indicate that they generally do not consent to the sale or sharing of their personal data.

- [Client-side Global Privacy Control (GPC)](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/global-privacy-control/client-side-support-gpc/): This article describes Tealium's client-side support for Global Privacy Control (GPC), a proposed browser standard that allows users to opt out of the sale or sharing of their personal data.

- [About consent integrations](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-integrations/about/): This article provides an overview of client-side consent integrations.

- [Consent integrations decision flow](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-integrations/consent-integrations-decision-flow/): The article describes the consent integrations decision flow for opt-in (GDPR-style) and opt-out (CCPA-style) enforcement patterns.

- [Manage consent integrations and purpose groups](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-integrations/manage/): This article explains how to manage client-side consent integrations and purpose groups.

- [Supported vendor integrations](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-integrations/supported-vendors/): This article describes the supported CMPs in client-side consent integrations and how to easily gather the relevant vendor-specific information to complete your consent integrations setup.

- [Validate and debug consent integrations](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-integrations/validate-and-debug/): This article describes how to validate and debug client-side consent integrations.

- [Custom CMP integrations](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-integrations/custom-cmp/): This article describes how to configure a custom consent management platform in client-side consent integrations.

- [Handling conflicts in enforcement conditions](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-integrations/enforcement-conditions-conflict/): This article describes how consent integrations handles conflicts in the conditional enforcement of purpose groups and exemptions, while adhering to privacy by design and privacy by default principles.

- [Event logging](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/client-side/consent-management/event-logging/): Learn how event logging works for client-side consent management.

- [Server-side Global Privacy Control](https://docs.tealium.com/consent/server-side/server-side-support-gpc/): This article describes Tealium's server-side support for Global Privacy Control (GPC), a proposed browser standard that allows users to opt out of the sale or sharing of their personal data.
